headerDisplay:
**Quick setup**
1. In UniFi OS → **Settings → Control Plane → Integrations**, create an **API Key** and paste it below.
2. Enter your console's address (the same one you use for the UniFi web app).
3. *(Optional, for arm/disarm)* In **Protect → Alarm Manager**, create webhook-triggered alarms with an **Arm** or **Disarm** action, and paste each **Trigger ID** below.
4. Save & restart. Your zones, hub and outputs are discovered automatically.
footerDisplay: Outputs and the emergency input are read-only (UniFi does not yet allow controlling them via the API). See the [README](https://github.com/actravis/homebridge-unifi-protect-alarm-hub) for details.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name shown for this platform in Homebridge logs.

host.title: UniFi Console Address
host.description: IP or hostname of your UDM / Cloud Key / NVR — the same address you use for the UniFi web app.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Create it in UniFi OS → Settings → Control Plane → Integrations, then paste it here.

securityName.title: Alarm tile name
securityName.description: Name for the alarm accessory in HomeKit (e.g. "Security System" or "Security").

armAwayTriggerId.title: "Away" arm — webhook Trigger ID
armAwayTriggerId.description: In Alarm Manager create an alarm: Trigger = Webhook, Action = Arm → Away. Paste its Trigger ID here. Leave blank if you don't use Away.

armNightTriggerId.title: "Night" arm — webhook Trigger ID
armNightTriggerId.description: Same, but Action = Arm → Night. Leave blank if you don't use Night.

disarmTriggerId.title: Disarm — webhook Trigger ID
disarmTriggerId.description: Same, but Action = Disarm. Leave all three blank and the alarm tile shows status but can't be changed from HomeKit.

glassBreakAs.title: Show glass-break sensors as
glassBreakAs.description: HomeKit has no native glass-break type.

exposeOutputs.title: Expose alarm-hub outputs
exposeOutputs.description: Shows outputs (e.g. the Beeper) as read-only sensors. UniFi does not yet allow controlling them from HomeKit.

exposeEmergencyInput.title: Expose emergency input
exposeEmergencyInput.description: Shows the emergency terminal as a read-only sensor.

sirenOutputChannels.title: Siren output channel(s)
sirenOutputChannels.description: Which output channel(s) mean a real alarm, for the "triggered" state (comma-separated, 1-indexed to match UniFi). Leave blank to treat any active output as triggered.

refreshInterval.title: Fallback refresh interval (seconds)
refreshInterval.description: How often to re-check state when realtime updates are quiet. Lower is snappier but hits the console harder.

useRealtime.title: Use realtime updates
useRealtime.description: Recommended. Uses the console's push feed for ~1–2s updates, falling back to the interval above.

trustSelfSignedCert.title: Trust console certificate
trustSelfSignedCert.description: UniFi consoles use self-signed certificates. When on, the plugin trusts this specific console. Leave on unless you've installed your own valid certificate.

certificateSha256.title: Pin certificate (SHA-256)
certificateSha256.description: Optional, most secure. Paste the console's certificate SHA-256 fingerprint (hex, colons optional) to pin it. When set, only that exact certificate is accepted and the setting above is ignored.
